notes: Add a build:widget script and include it in build: "build:widget": "vite build --config vite.config.widget.ts", "build": "pnpm run build:widget && react-router build".
Add tsconfig.widget.json to the references array in tsconfig.json.
Uncomment the assets block in wrangler.jsonc so /widget.js is served from ./public.
Register the public controller in workers/api/index.ts BEFORE the authed group.
Apply references/public-read-patch.md to add an unscoped public read.
